name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Invalid Password at Login
notes: This building block detects invalid password at login.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Invalid Password at Login on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5000475) Failure Audit: An account failed to log on
when the event matches Username is not N/A
when the event matches Extended Error Code (custom) contains any of 0xC000006A
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Invalid Password at Login on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000475) Failure Audit: An account failed to log on
AND when the event matches Username is not N/A
AND when the event matches Extended Error Code (custom) contains any of 0xC000006A
